title: Senior Radiologist at Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions:
Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre Ventures Solutions!
